question: Based on the chart, how does the total number of visits from Social compare to those from Direct across all weeks shown?

options.A: Social has slightly fewer total visits than Direct
options.B: Social has about twice as many total visits as Direct
options.C: Social has slightly more total visits than Direct
options.D: Social and Direct have exactly the same total visits

explanation: The y-axis starts at 1000 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Direct look as large as (or larger than) Social even though the totals favor Social.
